TP_PERSEPHONE_01.bDesc: Keeping the castle clean by any means neccescary.

TP_DISCARMOR.bDesc: An echo bounces between the interior walls of this animated armor, the guttural cry of a long dead warrior screaming into eternity: "LET. IT. RIP".

TP_ADV_PERSEPHONE.bDesc: Keeping the castle clean by any means neccescary.

TP_ADV_MEDUSA.bDesc: The Sisterhood of Witches keeps secrets that could topple dynasties. Four fifths of these secrets are sex scandals. The influx of noble bribe money ensures that no witch goes without a fancy hat.

TP_ADV_MEDUSA_02.bDesc: The Sisterhood of Witches keeps secrets that could topple dynasties. Four fifths of these secrets are sex scandals. The influx of noble bribe money ensures that no witch goes without a fancy hat.

TP_ADV_GAIBON_RED.bDesc: Serpentine seductresses whose hypnotic gaze can lure even the most willful of scholars to an early grave.

TP_ADV_GHOST_BOMB.bDesc: There are works so incomprehensible in theme and meaning as to fracture the reader’s very grasp of reality. Torn from the material world through sheer force of their disbelief in it, these scholarly fools are only one last thought away from volatile oblivion.

TP_ADV_XLDISCARMOR.bDesc: An echo bounces between the interior walls of this animated armor, the guttural cry of a long dead warrior screaming into eternity: "LET. IT. RIP".

TP_ADV_BOSS_XLDISCARMOR.bDesc: An echo bounces between the interior walls of this animated armor, the guttural cry of a long dead warrior screaming into eternity: "LET. IT. RIP".
